Role: CLARIN C-centre for Swedish text resources and tools.
SurveyTreatment: Relevant infrastructure; primarily text resources, not a main source of multimodal entries in this pass.
Notes: Important for Swedish text corpora and annotation infrastructure. Multimodal resource discovery should continue through resource records rather than the node overview alone.

Role: Speech analysis and Swedish speech-technology resources.
SurveyTreatment: Primary source for KTH speech resources.
Notes: Hugging Face records under the KTH organization now provide direct access points for SpeechDat and Waxholm.

Role: Language and folklore archive resources, dialects, names and folk-memory material.
SurveyTreatment: Primary source for Swedish archive audio/text/map resources.
RelatedResources: Isof dialect and folklore recordings / Intervjuer och inspelningar
Notes: Folke and Dialektkartan expose public browser interfaces; large underlying collections may have access restrictions.

Role: Computational linguistics, DiaRes, CLARIN-SMS, historical text and parsing resources.
SurveyTreatment: Mentioned as a node; no confirmed public Swedish multimodal dataset found in this pass.
Notes: Named resources include HistCorp, Swedish Treebank, Decode and Swedish Diachronic Corpus. These are important but appear primarily text/tool oriented from the public node page.

Role: Digital humanities infrastructure, text analysis, data visualization/publication and DH projects.
SurveyTreatment: Mentioned as a node; no confirmed Swedish language-resource dataset added.
Notes: Public node page mentions 3D rock-art analysis, image recognition and performing-arts mapping; these are multimodal DH leads but not confirmed Swedish language resources.

Role: CLARIN-MULTISENS C/K-centre for multimodal and sensor-based data.
SurveyTreatment: Primary source for Swedish or Swedish-relevant multimodal/sensor resources.
Notes: The Lund archive hosts Swedish and Swedish-relevant multimodal/sensor resources, including LACOLA Övdalian fieldwork. The archive also hosts many non-Swedish language-documentation collections; those were excluded from the main JSON unless Swedish/Sweden relevance was verified.

Role: Humlab DigiTal speech-processing infrastructure and support for recorded speech workflows.
SurveyTreatment: Mentioned as a node; no concrete public dataset added.
Notes: Node page says the initial focus is Sami material and legally sensitive recordings, with public versions of corpora as a goal.

Role: Computational linguistics and Swedish Sign Language resources.
SurveyTreatment: Primary source for Swedish Sign Language corpus evidence.
RelatedResources: Svensk teckensprakskorpus / Swedish Sign Language Corpus (STS-korpus)
Notes: The node page states STS-korpusen had 18 hours of video and 146,000 annotated sign tokens as of 2019-12-31.

Role: National Library of Sweden language resources, cultural heritage data and KBLab datasets.
SurveyTreatment: Primary source for parliamentary speech via KBLab.
Notes: KBLab Hugging Face datasets include RixVox-v2, a Swedish parliamentary speech resource.

Role: Text-based language resources, translation corpora, treebanks and Swedish/multilingual text processing.
SurveyTreatment: Mentioned as a node; no confirmed public Swedish multimodal dataset found in this pass.
Notes: Named resources include Linköping Translation Corpus, LinES and easy-to-read corpora; public description is text-resource focused.

Role: National archive, historical documents, maps, images and DiaRes participation.
SurveyTreatment: Primary source for Riksarkivet HTR/OCR training data and a reviewed lead for additional archive image/text datasets.
RelatedResources: Training data for Swedish Lion Libre
Notes: Riksarkivet Hugging Face datasets include public image+text HTR/OCR training data. Swedish Lion Libre groups line-level training datasets, and Swedish Fraktur is a separate OCR dataset with explicit Språkbanken provenance.
